---
title: 'Brain Storm Diagram'
date: '2012-09-18T04:59:00.0060000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Call To Excellence'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5742304662802151423'
blogger_filename: '/2012/09/brain-storm-diagram.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Call To Excellence/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<div style="color: #444444; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
Brain Storm Diagram</div>
<div style="color: #444444; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://calltoexcellence.files.wordpress.com/2012/09/brain-storm-diagram.jpg" href="https://docs.google.com/file/d/0B8d4L33vHnHLMFpxRDVsZkRfbkU/edit" style="clear: left; color: #cd4517; float: left; line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img alt="" class="aligncenter size-full wp-image-186" data-mce-src="http://calltoexcellence.files.wordpress.com/2012/09/brain-storm-diagram.jpg" height="480" src="http://calltoexcellence.files.wordpress.com/2012/09/brain-storm-diagram.jpg" style="border: 0px; clear: both; color: #444444; display: block; line-height: 1.4; margin: 0px auto; max-width: 645px;" title="Brain Storm Diagram" width="640" /></a></div>
